[PDF_PAGE 94 | score=18] Men highest bidder. When encountered there is an even chance may be already hired and on their way to a war, rendezvousing a prospective employer, open for employment, Or on their way home and not willing to be hired See Adventurers" t0 determine level and possessions. Merchant Sailors/Fishermen These are found on Or near open waters. If encountered inland, sailors may be ferrymen on a stream Or river. Fishermen will ei- ther be on their way to a fishing site, engaged in fishing, Or return- with their catch: Sailors may be armed with knives, shortswords, cutlasses, or belaying pins (1 point of damage) .
